title: [Snyk Code] Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
description:
## Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `examples/sakila/build_sakila.py`
**Location:** line 78, column 14 to line 78, column 21
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-918
### Snippet (examples/sakila/build_sakila.py:76-80)
```
  76 |     request = Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "virtuus-sakila-builder"})
  77 |     try:
  78 |         with urlopen(request) as response:
  79 |             data = response.read()
  80 |     except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - network errors vary
```

**Issue Key:** b2a66a08-73eb-427c-b2f1-d87d683b0c43

### Details
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fixed. Added https:// scheme validation in examples/sakila/build_sakila.py download_db(): raises ValueError if a non-https URL is passed, preventing redirection to internal/arbitrary hosts.
